His prediction about the weather managed to be surprisingly accurate. 他對天氣的預測（預言）竟然出奇地準確。
The researchers published their predictions for future technological. 研究人員發表了他們對未來技術發展的預測。
She is currently in the third month of her pregnancy and doing well. 她目前懷孕（懷孕）三個月，狀況良好。
The hospital offers specialized care for high-risk pregnancies now. 醫院現在為高風險孕婦提供專門的照護。
We were delighted to hear the news that she is pregnant with a baby. 聽說她懷孕（懷孕）了，我們很高興。
Pregnant women should avoid eating certain types of seafood lately. 孕婦（懷孕的）最近應避免食用某些類型的海鮮。
She gave a very impressive presentation on global warming today. 她今天做了一場關於全球暖化的、令人印象深刻的簡報（推介會）。
The students are busy with the preparation for their final project. 學生們正忙著準備他們最終專案的簡報（推介會）。
The organization aims to promote environmental preservation lately. 該組織最近旨在推廣環境保護（儲存，指保護）。
The preservation of ancient historical artifacts manages to be vital. 古代歷史文物的保存（儲存）竟然是至關重要的。
We must take steps to preserve our natural environment for future. 我們必須採取措施為未來保護（儲存）我們的自然環境。
The museum aims to preserve and display traditional local culture. 博物館旨在保存（儲存）並展示當地傳統文化。
Early detection is crucial for the successful prevention of disease. 早期發現對於成功預防（預防）疾病至關重要。
The government is taking steps to improve urban crime prevention now. 政府正採取措施提升現在城市的犯罪預防（預防）。
Our prime concern is the safety and security of all our customers. 我們首要的（主要的）關心是所有顧客的安全與保障。
The Prime Minister addressed the nation on television yesterday night. 首相（主要的）昨晚在電視上向全國發表了演講。
The ancient civilization developed a variety of primitive tools now. 古文明現今開發了各式各樣的原始（原始）工具。
Living in the jungle managed to feel like a very primitive lifestyle. 生活在叢林中竟然感覺像是一種非常原始的生活方式。
Safety managing to be our top priority during the mission today. 安全今天竟然（能）是我們任務中的首要任務（優先事項）。
We need to set clear priorities to achieve our goals effectively. 我們需要設定清晰的優先順序（優先事項）以有效地實現目標。
Everyone is entitled to their own individual and personal privacy. 每個人都有權享有自己的個人隱私。
Please respect my privacy and do not enter my bedroom without ask. 請尊重我的隱私，未經詢問不要進入我的臥室。
It was a great privilege to meet the world-famous author in person. 能親自見到那位世界聞名作家是莫大的榮幸（特權）。
Education is a basic right, not just a privilege for the wealthy. 教育是一項基本權利，而不僅僅是富人的特權。
Please follow the safety procedures carefully to avoid accidents now. 妳現在請仔細遵守安全程序（程式）以避免意外。
The legal procedure managing to be very complex and time-consuming. 法律程序（程式）竟然非常複雜且耗時。
The manager decided to proceed with the project despite the delay. 經理決定儘管延誤仍繼續（繼續）專案。
Please wait here for instructions before you proceed to the entrance. 在前往入口前，請在此等候指示。
We had a very productive meeting and made several key decisions now. 我們開了一個非常有成效的（富有成效的）會議，並現在做出了一些關鍵決定。
Regular exercise managing to make you feel more energetic and productive. 定期運動竟然（能）讓妳感到更有活力且更有效率。
She works as a successful doctor in the medical profession today. 她今天在醫療界（職業）擔任成功的醫生。
He decided to pursue a career in the legal profession after college. 他決定在大學畢業後從事法律界（職業）工作。
She always maintains a professional attitude, even when dealing with difficult clients. 即使在面對刁鑽的客戶時，她也始終保持專業的態度。
The report looks very professional with all the charts and data included. 這份報告包含了所有的圖表和數據，看起來非常專業。
The new investment proved to be highly profitable for the company within a year. 這項新投資在一年內就被證明對公司來說是非常有利可圖（賺錢）的。
The small bakery became profitable after they started selling specialty coffee. 自從開始販售精品咖啡後，這家小麵包店便開始轉虧為盈（獲利）。
He is a prominent figure in the tech industry and often gives keynote speeches. 他是科技界的知名（傑出）人物，經常受邀發表專題演講。
The landmark is very prominent and can be seen from several miles away. 這個地標非常顯眼（顯著），在幾英里外就能看到。
The young musician shows promising talent and has already won several awards. 這位年輕音樂家展現了大有可為（有前途）的才華，且已獲得數個獎項。
The initial results of the medical trial are very promising for future treatment. 醫療試驗的初步結果對於未來的治療來說非常樂觀（大有前途）。
She worked extremely hard and finally got a promotion to senior manager. 她工作非常努力，終於獲得晉升（升職）成為資深經理。
The supermarket is running a special promotion on fresh fruits this weekend. 超市本週末正在對新鮮水果進行特別促銷活動。
Thank you for your prompt reply to my urgent email earlier today. 感謝您對我今天早些時候發出的緊急郵件所給予的迅速（及時）回覆。
The unexpected news prompted him to change his travel plans immediately. 這個意外的消息促使他立即改變了旅行計畫。
Improving your English pronunciation takes time and constant practice. 改善你的英文發音需要時間和不斷的練習。
The dictionary provides a guide to the correct pronunciation of each word. 這本字典為每個單字提供了正確發音的指南。
The committee is currently reviewing the proposal for the new city park. 委員會目前正在審查新城市公園的提案（建議案）。
She was surprised and moved to tears by his romantic marriage proposal. 她對他浪漫的求婚感到驚喜萬分，並感動落淚。
With hard work and innovation, the family business continues to prosper. 憑藉著努力和創新，這個家族企業持續繁榮（興旺）發展。
Plants need enough sunlight and water to prosper in this environment. 植物需要充足的陽光和水分才能在這種環境中茂盛成長。
The country has enjoyed a long period of peace and economic prosperity. 這個國家享有長期的和平與經濟繁榮。
We wish you health, happiness, and prosperity in the new year. 我們祝你在新的一年裡健康、快樂、事業興旺（成功）。
The city has become a prosperous financial hub in recent decades. 在過去的幾十年裡，這座城市已成為一個繁榮的金融中心。
They moved to a more prosperous neighborhood to provide a better life for their children. 他們搬到了一個更富足（繁榮）的社區，為了給孩子提供更好的生活。
Eggs and lean meat are excellent sources of high-quality protein. 雞蛋和瘦肉是優質蛋白質的極佳來源。
It is important to include enough protein in your daily diet for muscle growth. 在日常飲食中攝取足夠的蛋白質對於肌肉生長非常重要。
Thousands of people gathered in the city center to protest against the new law. 數千人聚集在市中心，抗議這項新法案。
The peaceful protest was organized to raise awareness about climate change. 這場和平抗議活動旨在提高人們對氣候變遷的意識。
The long-term effects of the trauma can have deep psychological impacts. 創傷的長期影響可能會產生深遠的心理衝擊。
They conducted a psychological study to understand how people react to stress. 他們進行了一項心理研究，以了解人們對壓力的反應。
If you are feeling overwhelmed, talking to a professional psychologist might help. 如果你感到壓力過大，諮詢專業的心理學家可能會有幫助。
The child psychologist specializes in helping kids with learning disabilities. 這位兒童心理學家專門幫助有學習障礙的孩子。
She decided to major in psychology because she's fascinated by human behavior. 她決定主修心理學，因為她對人類行為很著迷。
Consumer psychology helps businesses understand why people buy certain products. 消費心理學幫助企業了解為什麼人們會購買特定產品。
The scientist celebrated the publication of his research in a prestigious journal. 這位科學家慶祝他的研究在一本知名期刊上發表（出版）。
This weekly publication covers the latest news in the world of technology. 這份週刊報導了科技界的最新新聞。
The new movie received a lot of publicity before it was even released. 這部新電影在上映前就獲得了大量的宣傳（關注）。
She avoids the publicity and prefers to keep her private life out of the media. 她避開公眾關注，更喜歡讓她的私生活遠離媒體。
The author plans to publish her first novel early next year. 作者計畫在明年年初出版她的第一本小說。
The government will publish the official report on the economic situation tomorrow. 政府明天將發布關於經濟狀況的官方報告。
It can be difficult for new authors to find a publisher for their work. 新作者很難為他們的作品找到出版商。
The publisher decided to print a second edition of the best-selling book. 出版商決定為這本暢銷書印製第二版。
She decided to quit her job to pursue her dream of becoming an artist. 她決定辭職，以追求成為藝術家的夢想。
The police continued to pursue the suspect through the narrow streets. 警察繼續在狹窄的街道上追趕嫌犯。
The pursuit of happiness is a fundamental right for every individual. 追求幸福是每個人的基本權利。
In his pursuit of excellence, he spent countless hours practicing the violin. 在追求卓越的過程中，他花了無數時間練習小提琴。
The two neighbors had a bitter quarrel over the fence between their houses. 這兩個鄰居因為房子之間的籬笆發生了激烈的爭吵。
They had a small quarrel this morning, but they have already made up. 他們今天早上發生了一點小口角，但現在已經和好了。
My grandmother spent months sewing this beautiful handmade quilt for me. 我祖母花了幾個月的時間為我縫製了這床漂亮的手工被（拼布被）。
It was so cold last night that I had to put an extra quilt on the bed. 昨晚太冷了，我不得不給床上加了一床厚被子。
The teacher asked us to include at least one quotation from the book in our essay. 老師要求我們在文章中至少包含一段書中的引文（引述）。
We requested a quotation from the construction company for the house renovation. 我們向建築公司索取了房屋裝修的報價單（報價）。
The ship's radar detected another vessel approaching in the thick fog. 船隻的雷達在濃霧中探測到另一艘船正在靠近。
Air traffic controllers use radar to monitor the location of all aircraft. 飛航管制員使用雷達來監控所有飛機的位置。
He was trembling with rage when he found out that his car had been stolen. 當他發現自己的車被偷時，氣得渾身發抖（狂怒）。

The average annual rainfall in this tropical region is quite high. 這個熱帶地區的平均年降雨量相當高。
Heavy rainfall caused several rivers to overflow their banks yesterday. 昨天的強降雨導致幾條河流的河水溢出了河岸。
She likes to add some raisins and nuts to her oatmeal in the morning. 她喜歡在早上的燕麥片裡加一些葡萄乾和堅果。
The children enjoyed the sweet raisin bread that their mother baked. 孩子們很喜歡母親烤的甜葡萄乾麵包。
We need to set a realistic deadline for the completion of the project. 我們需要為專案的完成設定一個現實（實際）的期限。
The special effects in the movie were so realistic that I felt like I was there. 電影中的特效非常逼真，讓我感覺身歷其境。
The young man decided to rebel against his parents' strict rules. 這個年輕人決定反抗父母嚴格的規定。

I'm sorry, I cannot recall your name at the moment, but your face is familiar. 抱歉，我現在想不起你的名字，但你的臉看起來很眼熟。

meaning: 接待、歡迎、接收信號、招待會
sentences: The wedding reception was held in a beautiful ballroom at a luxury hotel. 婚禮招待會是在一家豪華酒店美麗的宴會廳舉行的。
I'm sorry, I can't hear you clearly because the phone reception here is very poor. 抱歉，我聽不清楚你的聲音，因為這裡的手機訊號很差。
Can you share the recipe for this delicious chocolate cake? 你可以分享這個美味巧克力蛋糕的食譜嗎？
Hard work and persistence are the secret recipe for his success. 努力和堅持是他成功的秘訣（配方）。
He changed so much over the years that he was almost beyond recognition. 這些年他變化太大了，幾乎讓人認不出來（辨識不出）。
She received a special award in recognition of her outstanding contribution to the company. 她因對公司的傑出貢獻而獲得特別獎勵，以示認可（讚賞）。
The doctor said that her full recovery from the surgery would take several months. 醫生說她手術後的完全康復（痊癒）需要幾個月的時間。
The economy is showing signs of a slow but steady recovery after the crisis. 危機過後，經濟正顯示出緩慢但穩定的復甦（恢復）跡象。
Reading and gardening are my favorite forms of recreation during the weekend. 閱讀和園藝是我週末最喜歡的娛樂（消遣）方式。
The city park provides various facilities for public recreation and sports. 城市公園為大眾娛樂和運動提供了多種設施。
We should all make an effort to recycle paper, plastic, and glass bottles. 我們都應該努力回收紙類、塑料和玻璃瓶。
The company uses recycled materials to make their environmentally friendly products. 該公司使用回收材料來製造環保產品。
The company announced a significant reduction in its workforce this year. 該公司宣布今年將大幅削減（減少）其勞動力。
You can get a further reduction in price if you pay for the goods in cash. 如果你用現金付款，價格可以進一步降低（折扣）。
Please refer to the instruction manual if you have any questions about the machine. 如果你對這台機器有任何疑問，請參考（查閱）說明書。
The doctor decided to refer the patient to a specialist for further tests. 醫生決定將病人轉介給專科醫生進行進一步檢查。
He made a brief reference to the incident during his speech but didn't go into detail. 他在演講中簡短地提到了（參考了）那次事件，但沒有詳述細節。

The calm surface of the lake reflected the surrounding mountains perfectly. 平靜的湖面完美地倒映（反射）出周圍的山巒。
After the project finished, we took some time to reflect on what we had learned. 專案結束後，我們花了一些時間來反思（思考）我們學到了什麼。
She stared at her own reflection in the mirror for a long time. 她對著鏡子裡自己的影像（倒影）凝視了良久。
The survey results are a clear reflection of public opinion on the new policy. 調查結果清楚地反映（體現）了大眾對新政策的意見。
The government is planning to implement major reforms in the healthcare system. 政府計畫在醫療保健系統中實施重大改革。
He promised to reform the company's management structure to improve efficiency. 他承諾要改革（改進）公司的管理結構以提高效率。
Thousands of refugees fled the country to escape the ongoing civil war. 數千名難民逃離該國，以躲避持續不斷的內戰。
The international community is providing aid and shelter to the homeless refugees. 國際社會正在向無家可歸的難民提供援助和避難所。
If you are not satisfied with the product, you can return it for a full refund. 如果你對產品不滿意，可以退貨並獲得全額退款。
The airline agreed to refund the ticket price because the flight was cancelled. 由於航班取消，航空公司同意退還機票費用。
His sudden refusal to cooperate with the team surprised everyone. 他突然拒絕與團隊合作，這讓每個人都很驚訝。
The application was met with a polite refusal from the committee. 該申請遭到了委員會禮貌性的拒絕。
I am writing to you regarding the upcoming conference next month. 我寫信給您是關於下個月即將舉行的會議。
He gave us some very useful information regarding the new project. 他向我們提供了一些關於新專案非常實用的資訊。
New students must register for their classes before the end of the week. 新生必須在本週末前註冊課程。
You can register your new laptop online to activate the warranty. 你可以在網上登記你的新筆電，以啟用保固。
Please complete the registration form and hand it in at the front desk. 請填寫註冊表並將其交給前台。
The registration fee for the marathon includes a T-shirt and a medal. 馬拉松的報名（註冊）費包括一件 T 恤和一枚獎牌。
The new law aims to regulate the use of social media among teenagers. 這項新法案旨在管制青少年對社交媒體的使用。
You can use the thermostat to regulate the temperature in the room. 你可以使用恆溫器來調節房間內的溫度。
All employees must comply with the safety regulations in the factory. 所有員工必須遵守工廠的安全規定。
The government introduced new regulations to reduce environmental pollution. 政府引入了新的法規以減少環境污染。
Dealing with rejection is a difficult but necessary part of life. 處理拒絕是生活中艱難但必要的一部分。
He felt discouraged after receiving several rejection letters from publishers. 在收到幾封出版商的拒絕信後，他感到很沮喪。
Yoga is a great way to achieve physical and mental relaxation. 瑜伽是實現身心放鬆的好方法。
I need some relaxation after working such long hours this week. 這週工作了這麼長時間，我需要放鬆一下。

meaning: 相關的、切題的、有意義的
sentences: Please make sure your questions are relevant to the topic of discussion. 請確保你的問題與討論的主題相關（切題）。
She has all the relevant experience required for this senior position. 她具備擔任這個高級職位所需的所有相關經驗。
The doctor prescribed some medicine to help relieve the pain. 醫生開了一些藥來幫助緩解疼痛。
It was a huge relief to hear that everyone was safe after the earthquake. 聽到地震後大家都平安無事，真是鬆了一口大氣（減輕了壓力）。
He was reluctant to admit that he had made a mistake in front of his colleagues. 他不情願在同事面前承認自己犯了錯。
She gave a reluctant smile when they asked her to perform on stage. 當他們要求她上台表演時，她露出了勉強的微笑。
The teacher's encouraging remarks on my essay gave me a lot of confidence. 老師對我文章的鼓勵性評論給了我很大的信心。
He remarked that the weather was unusually warm for this time of year. 他談到（評論說）今年這個時節的天氣異常溫暖。

meaning: 卓越的、非凡的、值得注意的
sentences: She has made remarkable progress in her piano playing over the past year. 在過去的一年裡，她的鋼琴彈奏取得了卓越（顯著）的進步。
It is remarkable that the old bridge is still standing after so many years. 這座老橋在這麼多年後依然屹立不倒，真是令人驚嘆（非凡）。
Drinking hot ginger tea is a popular home remedy for a common cold. 喝熱薑茶是治療感冒的一種流行居家療法（補救方法）。
We need to find an effective remedy for the problem before it gets worse. 我們需要在問題惡化之前找到有效的補救方法。
I need to go to the library to renew my books for another two weeks. 我需要去圖書館把書續借（更新）兩週。
They decided to renew their wedding vows on their tenth anniversary. 他們決定在結婚十週年紀念日重新宣讀（更新）他們的婚約。
Learning a language requires constant repetition and practice. 學習語言需要不斷的重複和練習。
The movie was boring because of the constant repetition of the same jokes. 這部電影很無聊，因為同樣的笑話一直重複。
The painting is a beautiful representation of life in the countryside. 這幅畫是對鄉村生活的精美描繪（表現）。
Each district has its own political representation in the local government. 每個地區在地方政府中都有自己的政治代表。
The restaurant has a great reputation for serving fresh and delicious seafood. 這家餐廳以提供新鮮美味的海鮮而享有盛譽（名聲）。
It takes years to build a good reputation but only a few minutes to ruin it. 建立良好的聲譽需要多年時間，但毀掉它只需幾分鐘。
The brave firefighters came to the rescue of the family trapped in the fire. 勇敢的消防員前來營救（救援）被困在火災中的那家人。
The helicopter was used to rescue the mountain climbers during the storm. 直升機被用來在風暴中營救登山者。
Medical researchers are working hard to find a cure for the disease. 醫學研究人員正努力尋找治療這種疾病的方法。

meaning: 值得尊敬的、體面的、相當大的
sentences: He comes from a very respectable family and has a high social status. 他出身於一個非常受人尊敬的家庭，擁有很高的社會地位。

She started planning for her retirement early to ensure financial security. 她很早就開始規劃退休生活，以確保經濟上的安全感。

The family reunion at Christmas was a very happy and moving occasion. 聖誕節的家庭團圓是一個非常快樂且動人的場合。

She wrote a fascinating article about the 'revision' of the future. 她寫了一篇關於未來「revision」的引人入勝的文章。
The industrial revolution brought about significant changes in how people lived and worked. 工業革命給人們的生活和工作方式帶來了巨大的變化。

meaning: 陰涼的、可疑的、不正當的
sentences: They enjoyed a pleasant walk along the shady paths of the park. 他們在公園陰涼的小徑上愉快地散步。

It is shameful that so many children in the world are still suffering from hunger. 世界上仍有這麼多孩子在遭受飢餓之苦，這真是可恥（丟臉）。

meaning: 富有同情心的、憐憫的、支持的

A yawn is often a sign that someone is tired or needs more oxygen. 打哈欠通常是某人疲勞或需要更多氧氣的信號。
Despite being over sixty, she still has a very youthful appearance and energy. 儘管已經六十多歲了，她仍然擁有非常年輕的外表和活力。
The company wants to project a youthful and innovative image to its customers. 該公司希望向客戶展現年輕且創新的形象。
The test results showed some abnormal levels of sugar in his blood. 測試結果顯示他的血糖水平有些異常。
It is abnormal for it to be so cold in this region during the summer months. 這個地區在夏季月份如此寒冷是很反常的。

I was surprised by his abrupt change of mind regarding the project. 他對這項專案的想法突然改變，讓我感到很驚訝。

meaning: 荒謬的、可笑的、不合理的
sentences: The idea that we could finish this project in just one hour is completely absurd. 我們能在一個小時內完成這個專案的想法簡直是荒謬至極。
It's absurd to expect results without putting in any actual effort. 不投入任何努力就期望得到結果是不合理的。
The region is known for its abundant natural resources, such as timber and minerals. 該地區以其豐富的自然資源而聞名，如木材 Monroe 礦產。
There was abundant evidence to support the theory, including several long-term studies. 有充足的證據支持這一理論，包括多項長期研究。

Drug abuse is a serious problem that affects many families in the community. 藥物濫用是一個影響社區許多家庭的嚴重問題。
The government plans to accelerate the construction of the new highway system. 政府計畫加速新高速公路系統的建設。
Exposure to sunlight can accelerate the aging process of the skin. 暴露在陽光下會加速皮膚的老化過程。

meaning: 可進入的、可得到的、易理解的
sentences: The new museum is fully accessible to people with physical disabilities. 新博物館完全開放給殘疾人士進入（無障礙）。
We should strive to make quality education more accessible to everyone. 我們應該努力讓每個人都能更容易獲得優質教育。

meaning: 容納、提供住宿、適應、幫助
sentences: The new hotel can accommodate up to five hundred guests at a time. 這家新飯店一次最多可容納五百名客人。
We will do our best to accommodate your special requests during your stay. 我們將盡力在您入住期間滿足您的特殊要求。
The university provides on-campus accommodation for all first-year students. 大學為所有一年級學生提供校內住宿（住處）。
Finding affordable accommodation in the city center can be quite difficult. 在市中心尋找價格合理的住宿可能相當困難。
The two countries signed a historic peace accord to end the long-running conflict. 兩國簽署了一份歷史性的和平協議，以結束長期的衝突。
These results are in full accord with our earlier findings on the subject. 這些結果與我們早先關於該主題的研究結果完全一致。
She decided to major in accounting because she enjoys working with numbers. 她決定主修會計，因為她喜歡處理數字。
The company uses professional accounting software to manage its financial records. 公司使用專業的會計軟體來管理其財務記錄。
He finally acknowledged that he had made a mistake and apologized. 他終於承認自己犯了錯，並向大家道歉。
Please sign here to acknowledge that you have received the important package. 請在此簽名以確認您已收到這份重要包裹。
I need some time to acquaint myself with the new rules and procedures. 我需要一些時間來熟悉（使瞭解）新的規則和程序。
Please acquaint your colleagues with the changes made to the project plan. 請通知您的同事關於專案計畫所做的變動。
Language acquisition is a complex process that begins at a very young age. 語言習得是一個從很小的時候就開始的複雜過程。
The company announced the acquisition of a smaller startup earlier today. 該公司今天早些時候宣布收購了一家較小的初創企業。
Environmental activists organized a protest to demand more action on climate change. 環保人士組織了一場抗議活動，要求在氣候變遷方面採取更多行動。
She has been a human rights activist for many years, fighting for justice. 她多年來一直是人權活動家，為正義而奮鬥。

meaning: 尖銳的、劇烈的、敏銳的、急性的
sentences: He was rushed to the hospital after experiencing acute abdominal pain. 他在感到劇烈的（急性的）腹痛後被緊急送往醫院。
The country is currently facing an acute shortage of skilled medical staff. 該國目前正面臨醫護專業人員嚴重短缺的問題。
The school administration is responsible for managing all student activities. 學校行政部門負責管理所有的學生活動。
The new administration plans to introduce several major changes to the tax system. 新政府計畫對稅收制度進行幾項重大變革。
The job involves a lot of administrative tasks, such as filing reports and scheduling meetings. 這份工作涉及大量的行政任務，如存檔報告和安排會議。
She has strong administrative skills and can manage complex projects effectively. 她具備很強的管理能力，能夠有效地管理複雜的專案。
The system administrator is responsible for maintaining the company's computer network. 系統管理員負責維護公司的電腦網絡。
She works as an administrator at a large hospital, coordinating various departments. 她在一家大型醫院擔任行政人員，負責協調各個部門。

meaning: 青少年的、青春期的、青少年
sentences: Adolescent behavior can be difficult to understand at times due to rapid changes. 青少年的行為有時因快速變化而難以理解。
The program is designed to help adolescents develop important life skills. 該計畫旨在幫助青少年培養重要的生活技能。
The little girl adores her older brother and follows him everywhere. 這個小女孩非常崇拜她的哥哥，到哪裡都跟著他。
They adore spending their weekends hiking in the mountains and enjoying nature. 他們非常熱愛在週末去山裡健行，享受大自然。

If you have a food allergy, please inform the waiter before ordering your meal. 如果您有食物過敏，請在點餐前告知服務生。
The two technology giants formed a strategic alliance to develop a new operating system. 兩大科技巨頭結成了戰略聯盟。

The new house has ample storage space for all their belongings and furniture. 這座新房子有充足的儲物空間。

The antique shop sells a variety of furniture, paintings, and ornaments from the 19th century. 這家古董店出售 19 世紀的各種家具和繪畫。

Modern kitchen appliances, such as dishwashers and microwaves, save us a lot of time. 現代廚房電器為我們節省了大量時間。

In the political arena, candidates must be prepared to face tough questions. 在政治舞台上，候選人必須準備好面對艱難的問題。

The store offers a vast array of high-quality products at competitive prices. 這家商店提供了一系列物美價廉的優質產品。

meaning: 口齒清晰的、清晰地表達
sentences: She is a very articulate speaker who can present her ideas clearly and logically. 她是一位口齒清晰的演講者，能邏輯清晰地表達想法。

The farmer used an ass to carry heavy sacks of grain to the market. 農民用驢子把一袋袋沈重的糧食運到市場。
Don't be such an ass; you know perfectly well that's not true. 別當傻瓜了，你很清楚那不是真的。
The police arrested the suspect following a violent assault in the city center. 警方在市中心發生一起暴力襲擊事件後逮捕了嫌疑人。

Her ability to speak three languages is a major asset in her international career. 她會說三種語言的能力是她國際職業生涯中的一大優勢。
The whole project was based on the assumption that the market would grow steadily. 整個專案是基於市場將穩定成長的假設。

The news of his sudden departure astonished everyone who knew him. 他突然離開的消息讓所有認識他的人都感到驚訝。

She has always been interested in athletics and won several medals in high school. 她一直和田徑運動有緣，高中時贏得過幾枚獎牌。
The school provides various facilities for students to participate in athletics. 學校提供多種設施供學生參加體育運動。
Regular attendance at lectures is essential for students to succeed in the course. 定期出席講座對學生在課程中取得成功至關重要。

Patience and persistence are essential attributes for a successful entrepreneur. 耐心和毅力是成功企業家必備的特質（屬性）。
The scientists attribute the recent changes in climate to human activity. 科學家們將最近的氣候變化歸因於人類活動。
The rare diamond was sold for a record price at the auction in London. 這顆稀有鑽石在倫敦的拍賣會上以創紀錄的價格售出。
They decided to put their old house up for auction next month. 他們決定下個月把舊房子拿去拍賣。
The manager is the only one who can authorize travel expenses for the team. 經理是唯一可以批准團隊差旅費用的人。
You need to authorize the app to access your location settings. 您需要授權該應用程式訪問您的位置設置。
The local government is demanding more autonomy in managing its own budget. 地方政府要求在管理預算方面擁有更多自主權。
Giving employees more autonomy can lead to increased motivation and creativity. 給予員工更多自主權可以提高積極性和創造力。
The tourists stared in awe at the magnificent view of the Grand Canyon. 遊客們驚嘆地凝視著大峽谷的壯麗景色。

It is wrong to allow your emotions to dictate your business decisions. 讓情緒左右（規定/主宰）你的業務決策是不對的。
The students are practicing their English spelling with a dictation exercise. 學生們正在通過聽寫練習來練習英語拼寫。
The assistant carefully took down the dictation from the senior manager. 助手仔細記錄了高級經理的口述。
The country was ruled by a powerful dictator for several decades. 該國由一位強大的獨裁者統治了幾十年。
History provides many examples of the rise and fall of various dictators. 歷史提供了許多關於各種獨裁者興衰的例子。
The people fought hard to overthrow the military dictatorship and gain freedom. 人民艱苦奮鬥以推翻軍事獨裁統治並獲得自由。
Living under a dictatorship can be extremely difficult and dangerous for citizens. 生活在獨裁政權下對於公民來說可能極其困難且危險。
The heavy truck is equipped with a powerful diesel engine for long trips. 這輛重型卡車配備了強大的柴油引擎，適合長途旅行。
Diesel fuel is often used for commercial vehicles such as buses and ships. 柴油燃料常用於巴士和船舶等商業交通工具。
It can be difficult to differentiate between these two very similar species. 很難區分這兩種非常相似的物種。
The new software includes features that help to differentiate it from its rivals. 這款新軟體包含了一些功能，有助於將其與競爭對手區分開來。

He showed great diplomacy and patience while handling the difficult situation. 他在處理困難局面時表現出了出色的外交手腕和耐心。
The manager issued a new directive regarding the company's security policies. 經理發布了關於公司安全政策的新指令。
All employees must follow the directives provided by the safety committee. 所有員工都必須遵循安全委員會提供的指示（指令）。

Please make sure you disable the alarm system before entering the building. 進入大樓前請確保關閉（使無效）警報系統。
The sudden economic crisis had a disastrous impact on the local community. 突然的經濟危機對當地社區產生了災難性的影響。
The company's new project turned out to be a disastrous failure and lost millions. 公司的新專案結果成了一次慘重的失敗，損失了數百萬。
She stared at the winning lottery ticket in a state of total disbelief. 她盯著中獎的彩票，處於完全不敢置信（懷疑）的狀態。

Please do not discard any plastic or glass bottles; they should be recycled. 請不要丟棄任何塑料或玻璃瓶；它們應該被回收。
He decided to discard his old clothes and buy some new ones for the trip. 他決定扔掉（拋棄）舊衣服，買些新的去旅行。
The factory was accused of discharging toxic chemicals into the local river. 工廠被指控向當地河流排放有毒化學物質。

The famous philosopher had many dedicated disciples who followed his teachings. 這位著名的哲學家有許多致力於遵循其教導的弟子（門徒）。

The employee faced disciplinary action following the violation of the rules. 該員工因違反規定面臨紀律處分（懲戒行動）。
The school has a strict disciplinary policy to maintain order and respect. 學校有著嚴格的紀律政策以維持秩序和尊重。

The patient experienced some discomfort in his stomach after taking the medicine. 病人在服藥後感到胃部有些不適。
We apologize for any discomfort caused by the ongoing renovation work. 對於目前裝修工作帶來的任何不便（不適），我們深表歉意。
She made a discreet inquiry about the job vacancy to her colleague. 她向同事謹慎地打聽了一下職位空缺的情況。
The hotel provides a discreet and professional service to all its guests. 飯店為所有客人提供專業且低調（不引人注目）的服務。
The corruption scandal was a major disgrace for the entire government. 腐敗醜聞是整個政府的重大恥辱（丟臉之事）。
He resigned in disgrace following the publication of the news story. 在新聞報導發表後，他因蒙羞（失寵）而辭職。
To our dismay, the project was cancelled due to a lack of funding. 讓我們沮喪（驚愕）的是，該專案因缺乏資金而取消了。
She watched in dismay as the fire destroyed her beautiful garden. 她驚愕地看著大火摧毀了她美麗的花園。
While the new software is useful, it is not entirely indispensable for us. 雖然這款新軟體很有用，但對我們來說並非完全必不可少（是可有可無的）。
In times of economic crisis, many luxury items become dispensable. 在經濟危機時期，許多奢侈品變得可有可無（非必要）。
The machine is designed to dispense a precise amount of liquid detergent. 這台機器的設計旨在分發（分配）精確量的液體清潔劑。
The hospital pharmacy can dispense medications to outpatients quickly. 醫院藥房可以迅速為門診病人配藥（分發藥物）。
We bought several packs of disposable diapers for our summer holiday. 我們為暑假買了幾包拋棄式尿布。
The rise in disposable income has led to an increase in consumer spending. 可支配收入的增長導致了消費支出的增加。
The safe disposal of radioactive waste is a major environmental challenge. 放射性廢棄物的安全處理是一項重大的環境挑戰。
All the company's resources were at his disposal to finish the project. 公司的所有資源都供他支配（處置）以完成專案。
Please make sure you dispose of your garbage correctly in the bins. 請確保正確地將垃圾處理（丟棄）在垃圾桶裡。
His kind words disposed her to agree with his unusual proposal. 他親切的話語使她傾向於同意他那不同尋常的提案。
The government faced a lot of dissent from the public regarding the new tax. 政府在關於新稅收方面面臨著大眾的許多異議。

Please try to minimize distractions, such as noise and phones, while studying. 學習時請儘量減少如噪音和手機等干擾（分散注意力的事物）。
Watching a movie can be a pleasant distraction from the stress of work. 看電影可以是從工作壓力中獲得的一種愉快消遣。
The news of the accident caused a great deal of distress to the family. 事故的消息給那家人帶來了極大的痛苦（憂慮）。
The ship sent out a distress signal after hitting a large rock near the coast. 船在撞上岸邊的大石頭後發出了求救（遇險）信號。
The loud music from the neighbor's party was a major disturbance. 鄰居派對上震耳欲聾的音樂是一個重大的干擾。
The police were called to control the disturbance in the city center. 警察被召集來控制市中心發生的騷亂。
The company decided to diversify its product range to attract more customers. 公司決定使其產品多樣化以吸引更多客戶。
It is important to diversify your investment portfolio to reduce risk. 分散（多元化）投資組合以降低風險是非常重要的。
The construction work required a major traffic diversion in the city center. 施工需要對市中心的交通進行重大改道（轉向）。
Reading is my favorite diversion during the long winter evenings. 在漫長的冬夜，閱讀是我最喜歡的消遣。

His hard work and dedication eventually paid off in dividends. 他的努力和奉獻最終獲得了回報（紅利）。

The project was doomed to failure from the start due to a lack of funding. 由於缺乏資金，該專案從一開始就注定要失敗。

There has been a steady downward trend in the price of fuel recently. 最近燃料價格一直呈穩定下降趨勢（向下的）。
The hikers carefully navigated the steep downward path through the woods. 登山者小心翼翼地穿過森林裡陡峭的下行小徑。
The bird swooped downward to catch a small fish in the river. 鳥兒向下俯衝，去捕捉河裡的小魚。
Please make sure you look downwards when you are walking on the stairs. 下樓梯時請務必向下看。

She enjoyed a quick doze on the sofa after finishing her lunch. 吃完午飯後，她喜歡在沙發上小睡一會兒。
The company needed to take drastic measures to reduce its financial losses. 公司需要採取劇烈（激烈）的措施來減少財務損失。

There is a cold draught coming from under the door of the small room. 小房間的門下有一股冷風（穿堂風）吹進來。
The architect provided a preliminary draught of the building design. 建築師提供了建築設計的初步草圖（草稿）。

He is always a very neat dresser and pays great attention to his appearance. 他總是一個穿著非常整潔的人，非常注意自己的外表。

The professor's lecture provided a lot of enlightenment on the complex topic. 教授的講座對這個複雜的主題提供了很多啟發。

The billionaire is always accompanied by an escort of professional bodyguards. 這位億萬富翁總是有專業保鏢隨從（護送）。

Building self-esteem is an important part of personal growth and development. 建立自尊（尊重自我）是個人成長的重要組成部分。
Waiting for the exam results felt like an eternity for the students. 等待考試結果對學生來說感覺就像過了永恆（極長的時間）。
The poet wrote about the beauty of nature and the search for truth in eternity. 詩人描寫了自然之美以及對永恆真理的追求。

The examiner carefully reviewed each student's oral presentation. 主考官仔細審核了每位學生的口頭報告。

To excel in any field, you must be willing to put in a lot of hard work. 要在任何領域勝過（表現優異）他人，你必須願意付出大量努力。
